info.title: The Close Developer API
info.description: Agent-facing API for The Close. Use scoped bearer tokens for transaction, field, document, task, and event workflows.

tags.name: Fields
tags.description: Structured extraction outputs and field review actions.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Upload, version, and status management for documents.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Activity timeline feeds and streaming updates.

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Task queue and transaction coordination actions.

tags.name: Agent Actions
tags.description: Approval queue proposals and review endpoints.

tags.name: Connector Actions
tags.description: Connector-backed task proposal, dry-run, approval, and audited execution records.

tags.name: Intake
tags.description: Contract upload intake, extraction polling, and cancellation.

tags.name: Address Lookup
tags.description: Server-side address suggestion and enrichment endpoints.

tags.name: Portal
tags.description: Shared document portal invitations and access.

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: Signed-in TC account profile and notification preferences.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Operator metrics and dead-letter queue tools.

tags.name: Access Tokens
tags.description: Scoped API tokens for external agent access.

BearerAuth.description: Scoped agent token from Settings > API. Supports read_only/read_write permissions and transaction/tc_all/brokerage scopes.

SessionHeaderAuth.name: x-user-id
SessionHeaderAuth.description: TC session identity forwarded by Next.js middleware for browser-authenticated users. x-user-role is also forwarded when present.

roleKey.description: Role key for the transaction link (default: contact)

get.description: Returns the process health and confirms the API runtime is responsive.
Returns deals ordered by health. Supports search (?q=), status filter, health filter, and closing date range.

patch.description: Status changes are validated against the deal state machine. Invalid transitions return 422.

200.description: Billing summary for the active account

post.summary: Create a Stripe checkout session for plan changes
Create a Stripe customer portal session
Stripe webhook for subscription lifecycle events

get.summary: List API tokens for the signed-in TC
List usage entries for a token

get.description: Returns every FieldDefinition. Agents call this to self-document available fields before acting on a transaction.

post.summary: Link a contact to a deal (or create one inline)
post.description: Pass `contactId` to link an existing contact, or pass `firstName` + `lastName` (with optional emails/phones) to create and link in one atomic call.

403.description: Caller does not own the deal
Caller does not own the deal

get.summary: Generate Gmail filter XML for a deal
get.description: Returns a Gmail-importable filter XML that matches emails from deal contacts and auto-forwards to the deal's capture address. When no contacts have email addresses, returns JSON with help text instead.

200.description: Gmail filter XML or help text when no emails found

post.summary: Confirm Gmail filter installation for a deal

get.description: Returns agent actions, optionally filtered by deal or status.

post.description: Creates or links the suggested contact to the transaction and triggers email filter regeneration.

400.description: Action is not a contact suggestion

409.description: Version conflict or action already resolved

post.description: Rejects the contact suggestion without creating or linking a contact.

400.description: Action is not a contact suggestion

409.description: Version conflict or action already resolved

post.summary: Mark an agent action as stale
post.description: Marks a pending action as stale when transaction state has changed, preventing approval until dismissed or edited.

404.description: Agent action not found or not pending

post.summary: Batch invalidate stale proposals for a transaction
post.description: Checks all pending actions for a transaction and marks matching ones as stale based on staleness rules.

422.description: Invalid connector ref or non-writable capability

409.description: Version conflict or proposal not approved

get.summary: List activity events for a transaction
get.description: Returns activity events paginated, newest first. Supports filtering by event_type and actor_type.

schema.description: Cursor for pagination (event ID to start after)

parameters.description: Cursor for pagination (event ID to start after)
parameters.name: cursor

cursor.description: Next cursor for pagination, null if no more

get.description: Returns activity events across all transactions, newest first. Used by dashboard and NL context injection.

schema.description: Cursor for pagination (event ID to start after)

parameters.description: Cursor for pagination (event ID to start after)
parameters.name: cursor

get.summary: SSE event stream for a transaction
get.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Supports Last-Event-ID for reconnect replay. If Last-Event-ID references a deleted/unknown event, sends a 'resync' event then replays last 50.
Cross-deal task list for pipeline UI. Filter by assignee type or unassigned.

schema.description: Filter: tc (my tasks), party, agent, unassigned

parameters.description: Filter: tc (my tasks), party, agent, unassigned
parameters.name: assignee

post.summary: Send a portal invite to an external party
post.description: Creates a magic link scoped to a deal and role. Re-sending invalidates previous links for the same contact.

post.summary: Exchange magic link token for a session token
post.description: Validates the magic link JWT and returns a short-lived session token for portal API access.

get.summary: List documents visible to a portal user
get.description: Returns documents filtered by the authenticated portal user's role. Requires portal session token.

get.summary: List notifications for the current TC
get.description: Returns notifications ordered with unread first, then by recency. Supports filtering by type.

schema.description: TC user ID (will come from auth in production)

parameters.description: TC user ID (will come from auth in production)
parameters.name: tc_id

post.summary: Mark all notifications as read for a TC

post.description: Public submission endpoint. Maps values to field definitions and auto-populates deal fields.

post.summary: Enrich a partial address with missing structured fields
Upload a contract PDF for intake extraction
post.description: Accepts server-side multipart PDF upload, stores the file, creates an intake session, and enqueues extraction.

201.description: Contract uploaded and intake session created

409.description: Duplicate intake already enqueued for the same file

post.summary: Undo an auto-created transaction from a forwarded contract

200.description: Undo completed or was already applied

post.summary: Create a transaction from an intake session

409.description: Intake cannot be committed in its current state

get.summary: List webhook subscriptions for the signed-in TC
List delivery attempts for a webhook subscription

post.description: Accepts multipart PDF upload. Stores in S3/R2 with a deal-scoped path.

delete.description: Marks document as deleted. S3 object is retained.

post.summary: Link an already-uploaded S3 object to a deal

get.description: Returns a short-lived signed URL for downloading the document.

post.summary: Upload a new version of a document
post.description: Replaces the current version. Old version is superseded, not deleted. Provenance to old version is preserved.

get.summary: List version history for a document
List all field values with provenance

patch.summary: Set a field value (TC manual edit)
patch.description: Triggers provenance storage and DateRule recalculation for dependent tasks.

post.description: Atomically writes all extracted values with idempotency key.

post.summary: Mark a field as reviewed by TC
Mark a field as disputed (conflicting values)
Mark a field as stale (may be outdated)

get.description: Returns count of fields in each review state for the overview tab.

post.description: Parses uploaded CSV content and returns auto-mapped columns against canonical field keys. Unmapped columns are flagged for manual review.
Creates transactions in bulk from CSV rows. Import is additive only and each imported field is tagged with source=csv_import provenance.

422.description: Invalid CSV payload or mapping overrides

get.summary: List dismissed callout keys for the authenticated user

post.summary: Mark a callout key as seen (dismissed) for the authenticated user

get.summary: Check whether a specific callout has been seen

200.description: Whether the callout has been seen

get.description: Returns failed jobs across all queues. TC-owner only.

post.summary: Retry a failed job from DLQ
post.description: Re-enqueues a failed job for processing.

delete.description: Removes a failed job from the DLQ without retrying.

get.description: Most-corrected fields across all transactions. TC-owner only.
Accuracy stats per prompt version for before/after comparison.

get.summary: Regression test set for prompt changes
get.description: Top 10 most-corrected fields to test before prompt updates.
Full correction log with original AI values and TC corrections.

get.summary: VA replacement proxy — weekly action summary

get.description: Browse template library, optionally filtered by type.

post.summary: Apply a template to a deal
post.description: Clones template data into the deal. Does not link — changes to the template won't affect the deal.

get.summary: List captured emails for a deal timeline
get.description: Returns the server-projected email timeline rows by joining inbound emails and email-sourced documents.

post.description: Generates an email draft from deal context using the LLM model router.

patch.summary: Update an email (edit draft, approve, reject)

post.description: Receives inbound emails, associates with transaction via reply address, stores as received email.
